note: The "then you cannot add life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn" means that Newgate's leader effect or any other card that would take a life from the life pile and add it to hand cannot be done anymore during this turn. So for example Edward Newgate's leader effect states that at the end of the turn take a life card to hand. This essentially stops that from happening.
